# calendario HOME (Desktop)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: qnw-9wa-ei2.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/
2. Click on the search field
3. Enter "barcelona" in the search field
4. Click and select Barcelona in the suggestions
5. Click on date picker in the search bar
6. Expand calendar navigation
7. Click the arrow to navidate to the next month
8. Click the arrow to navidate to the next month
9. Select date 1 in the first month
10. Select date 2 in the first month
11. Wait until accommodations are fully loaded
